value: SeaBearKitTests.swift includes a private `CornerRadiusHelper` enum that re-implements the corner-radius math (lines ~338-352). This duplication is intentional: the production methods are static on `View`, which is hard to call directly in tests. If you change the formula in CornerRadiusModifiers.swift, update CornerRadiusHelper too — the test will pass against the duplicate, not the real code, otherwise.
